name: Kill Wilbo
short_description: Kill Wilbo is a fast-paced multiplayer PvP game where players compete in a vibrant, cartoon-style crowd scene. Use your sniper scope to find hidden targets, score points, and end the match by taking down the elusive Wilbo. Precision, speed, and strategy decide the winner!
detailed_description:
Kill Wilbo is a fast-paced party PvP game where players compete to spot hidden targets and rack up points before the round ends. Set in a vibrant, vector-made scene, everyone shares the same view, but only the sharpest eyes will succeed in finding their targets first.

Armed with a sniper scope and a list of objectives, you’ll search for your assigned targets among the detailed illustration. Each correct hit earns points, building towards the ultimate goal—finding and eliminating Wilbo. The game ends the moment Wilbo is taken out, but the player with the highest score wins.

Designed for quick, competitive play, Kill Wilbo is perfect for game nights, trash talk, and chaotic fun with friends. It’s easy to pick up, but challenging to master, offering a fresh twist on competitive multiplayer.
